source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Researchers were gathering data on alligators in an attempt to estimate an alligator's weight from its length. They captured 29 alligators and measured their length and weight. They created three regression models. Each model, along with its residual plot, is shown below. yrepresents the weight in pounds and xrepresents the length in inches.Which statement is true?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: There is a nonlinear relationship between weight and length, and model II is most appropriate.

choice_map.A: There is a linear relationship between weight and length, and model I is most appropriate.
choice_map.B: There is a linear relationship between weight and length, and model II is most appropriate.
choice_map.C: There is a nonlinear relationship between weight and length, and model I is most appropriate.
choice_map.D: There is a nonlinear relationship between weight and length, and model II is most appropriate.
choice_map.E: There is a nonlinear relationship between weight and length, and model III is most appropriate.
